_meta.author: serafimcloud
_meta.title: Spline Scene
_meta.description:
A React component that integrates Spline 3D scenes.

Demo component combines interactive 3D visualization with a spotlight effect and responsive text content.

Features:
	•	Lazy-loaded Spline integration
	•	Responsive layout with flex columns
	•	Gradient text effects
	•	Spotlight background effect
	•	Dark theme optimized
